global.description: The ad features a combination of decorative shapes and text elements promoting a booking service.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings and flexible booking options.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Two circular shapes in varying sizes, positioned in the center of the ad, with a light green background.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A square shape located in the center, overlapping with the circular shapes, also in a light green color.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A smaller circular shape in the center, slightly above the larger circular shape.

elements.label: Large square shape
elements.description: A large square shape in the center, with a light green background, providing a base for text.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned towards the right side of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Left decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned towards the left side of the ad.

elements.label: Right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element located towards the right side of the ad.

elements.label: Upper right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned in the upper right corner of the ad.

elements.label: Lower right decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element located in the lower right corner of the ad.

elements.label: Savings message
elements.description: Bold text at the bottom of the ad stating 'Last-minute savings Flexible booking options' in a dark font.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'RouteBloom' displayed prominently at the top of the ad in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Book now' in a dark font, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, last-minute savings, flexible booking options
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings, Flexible booking options, RouteBloom, Book now
